no_data_warning: No data available for the selected filters. Please adjust your filters.
try_different: Try selecting different dates, city, or hotel.
showing_records: Showing {count} records for the selected filters.
no_trend_data: No trend data available. Ensure date range contains valid data.
built_with: Hotel Price Analytics Dashboard | Built with Streamlit
checkout_after_checkin: Check-out date must be after check-in date.
no_season_data_for_range: No data is available for {season} within the selected date range.
try_different_season_or_dates: Try selecting a different season or adjusting the date range.
date_range_adjusted_to_season: Date range adjusted to match the selected season.
season_date_mismatch_explanation: Your selected dates were outside the {season} season. The date range was adjusted to show available data for this season.
econometric_regression_description: Explains how season, city, hotel fixed effects and a time trend jointly drive price per night. Coefficients are in USD; robust standard errors are used.
econometric_anova_description: Tests whether average prices differ across seasons using a classical one-way ANOVA.
econ_insight_season_increase: {season} increases prices by approximately {percent:+.1f}% relative to {baseline_season}, holding city and hotel constant.
econ_insight_season_reduce: {season} reduces prices by approximately {percent:+.1f}% relative to {baseline_season}, holding city and hotel constant.
econ_insight_city: City effect: prices in {city} are about {percent:.1f}% {direction} than in {baseline_city}, after controlling for season and hotel.
econ_insight_trend: Time trend: prices move by roughly {annual_change:+.2f} USD per year ({annual_pct:+.1f}% of the average level), indicating a {direction} drift over time.
econ_insight_significance: {sig_count} out of {total_count} explanatory coefficients are statistically significant at the 5% level (robust standard errors).
econ_insight_anova_sig: Seasonal effects are statistically significant (p < 0.05): average prices differ meaningfully across seasons.
econ_insight_anova_nonsig: Seasonal effects are not statistically significant at the 5% level: average prices across seasons are relatively similar.
econ_insight_season_pattern: Seasonal pattern: {max_season} is the most expensive season and {min_season} is the cheapest; on average, {max_season} prices are about {diff_pct:.1f}% higher than {min_season}.
yoy_requires_multiple_years: Year-over-year analysis requires data from multiple years.
forecasts_placeholder: Forecasting models will be available in the next iteration.
login_error_missing_secret: Application password is not configured. Please contact the administrator.
missing_file: Data file not found. Please check the server configuration.
